sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 3:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 3:1
items.html: The first three corrections of the thirteen corrections of Dikna are called “AHP in their Place.” It means that they did not come out from the phase of Rosh, and they are the phases of GE of the Rosh of Dikna. They are named AHP only with respect to the Rosh of SAG. (Part 6, Item 20)
